description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Multi coloured printed kurta, has brown, pink and blue panelling at the yoke with stitched detailing and decorative buttons, round neckline, sleeveless, side slits and a broad panel at the front hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
